goals.text: Implement the complete Ama's Kitchen delivery-ordering MVP defined in Amas-Kitchen-PRD.md.

requirements.text: Meet all customer, admin, and system acceptance criteria in Amas-Kitchen-PRD.md v3.0.

constraints.text: Deployment and infrastructure provisioning are excluded; deployment readiness and the managed 30-day backup requirement must be documented.

architectureDecisions.text: Continue with the repository's MERN architecture: React/Vite client, Express API, and MongoDB/Mongoose.

technicalDecisions.text: Use Nodemailer with configurable SMTP and admin-recipient environment variables for new-order emails.
Food-item media consists of multiple validated URLs; uploads and Cloudinary administration are out of scope.
Initial data is created through an idempotent, editable seed command.

domainKnowledge.text: Ama's Kitchen is one delivery-only restaurant using Cash on Delivery and an absolute Sunday closure in Europe/London.

risks.text: Order concurrency, idempotency, server-authoritative calculations, and secure cookie integration are high-risk implementation areas.

artifacts.text: Run dev completed application and workflow artifacts under _workflow/runs/dev with Fallow audit at .workflow/fallow-audit.md.

history.text: Advanced active artifact from spec to complete workflow evidence.

workflowHistory.text: Run dev completed all five tasks; workflow health Passed with justified PARTIAL Fallow verdict.

history.text: Advanced from spec approval to complete.

changeLog.text: Initialized durable project memory from PRD intake and saved specification.
